events.summary: Hi Marley <> USAA Demo & Technical Discussion
EMG Engage - Intro to Architecture w/Mark Francis | Louis, John
Monthly 1:1 w/Michael Hallock | Mark Francis (series end 6/5/26)

prep.summary: Locate no matches in your 'Work Notes' folder for previous meetings with Thomas or Larry—meaning you lack direct context on those specific interactions. Prepare instead to lead the discussion on critical ongoing operational shifts—specifically the AWS desktop architecture transition and the cybersecurity resource constraints. Use this monthly touchpoint to force alignment on these parallel paths before the series ends in June.
tasks: Request clarification on the missing Thomas and Larry meeting details—establishing the exact context needed for your next sync.
Evaluate the embedded UI widget option for the MSR desktop—preventing premature commitments to full platform replacements.
Assess the fifteen-to-twenty percent capacity reduction caused by the cybersecurity uplift—re-prioritizing near-term deliverables.
Consolidate the P&C business cases into a unified strategic document—aligning task mining initiatives directly with headcount reduction targets.
prep.title: Monthly 1:1 w/Michael Hallock | Mark Francis (series end 6/5/26)

events.summary: Follow up Discussions - post HM demo

prep.summary: You have no matching work notes for your past discussions with Jon or Praveena—meaning you must reconstruct these touchpoints from your direct calendar or external files. Focus your prep on general alignment areas—such as the AWS agent-assist POC or the ongoing P&C process strategy—to bridge these information gaps before meeting with Claire. Highlight these missing items immediately to keep the 1:1 structured and productive.
tasks: Search your local drive for any unindexed records of the last meetings with Jon and Praveena—focusing on recent D&S and architecture syncs.
Draft an agenda for Claire to address the resourcing constraints—specifically the unresolved backfills for Matt Unsworth and Deepak.
Define the scope of the AWS agent-assist POC—clarifying the integration of the embedded UI widget inside the Conversant desktop.
Prepare for a potential capacity reduction of fifteen to twenty percent—stemming from the upcoming cybersecurity uplift program.
prep.title: Monthly 1:1 w/Claire Veitenheimer | Mark Francis

prep.summary: You must address critical operational shifts across P&C and Lifeco—specifically the parallel execution of the Skan.ai task-mining pilot and the integration of AWS assist widgets into the MSR desktop to avoid complete system disruption. Strategic execution faces severe capacity constraints—including a 15–20% delivery reduction from cybersecurity hygiene work and unresolved backfills for Matt Unsworth and Deepak—while technical decision-making shifts to Integration Architects who require urgent training. Additionally, you must resolve the ongoing friction surrounding data migrations to 5Tran and Iceberg alongside the complex compliance requirements of the NART process.
tasks: Establish a clear RACI matrix for Integration Architects—addressing their capacity and skill gaps—before delegating further technical decision-making.
Resolve the outstanding backfills for Matt Unsworth and Deepak to mitigate resource constraints across your delivery schedules.
Monitor the consolidation of P&C business cases under Robbie—specifically aligning Claims, DNS, and Agency—to support the targeted September/October Skan.ai production pilot.
Address the security and compliance hurdles regarding PII/NPI sharing that are currently holding up the visual voicemail and two-way texting rollouts.
prep.title: Enterprise Architecture Leadership Sync (series ends 1/...)

prep.summary: Review the June 11 Skan.ai RFP session—the only documented meeting with Suresh in your folder—which focused on parallel paths for task mining via SCANT and aligning P&C business cases. No records exist for a second meeting with Suresh or any meeting with Jonathan—requiring you to gather these status updates directly during the session. Use this context to align the Conversational Quote App with your broader digital transformation goals—specifically reducing contact center volumes.
tasks: Confirm Suresh's progress regarding his offline alignment with Jim Diagostino and the Tech PMO on SCANT task mining.
Reconstruct the missing meeting outcomes with Jonathan to address outstanding conversational app design decisions.
Map the Conversational Quote App requirements to the model-driven architecture and reusable APIs discussed on June 15.
Secure the consolidated P&C business case from Robbie to verify headcount reduction targets match your application goals.
prep.title: Conversational Quote App
